<?php namespace Illuminate\Console\View\Components\Mutators; use Illuminate\Support\Stringable; class EnsureNoPunctuation { /** * Ensures the given string does not end with punctuation. * * @param string $string * @return string */ public function __invoke($string) { if ((new Stringable($string))->endsWith(['.', '?', '!', ':'])) { return substr_replace($string, '', -1); } return $string; } }
